name: Taiho Kogyo Co., Ltd.
summary: Taiho Kogyo Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells bearings in Japan. It provides engine bearings; and bushings and thrust washers for engine and engine accessory components, and steering systems, as well as for differential, transmission, suspension, and other applications. The company also offers special bearings for use in automobile and home air conditioning compressors, turbochargers, and steering systems; and EGR valves and actuators for use in turbochargers. In addition, it provides aluminum die-cast products; plastic products; and precision dies, including sintering, precision casting, and precision plastic molding dies. The company was founded in 1944 and is headquartered in Toyota, Japan.
